metadata.description: Tool-agnostic engineering workflow plugin usable by any AI agent (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Windsurf, Codex, etc.).

plugins.name: agent-protocol
plugins.description: Surface-first change analysis, SoT discipline, four-mode execution (Zero-ceremony / Three-line delivery / Lean / Full), evidence-driven delivery. Ships with bridge files for multiple AI agent runtimes.
